name: referral_pipeline_digest
description: Digest of every referred deal in the pipeline, grouped by introducing partner: stage, status, conversion, deep links. Optionally scoped to one partner and/or to deals updated in the last N days.

partner.description: Scope the digest to one partner — name as the user said it, or an exact id

days.description: Only include deals updated in the last N days; omit for all referred deals
